semantic_description: array_sum scans an integer array a of length n with a single for loop, accumulates ret from 0 by adding a[i] for each index 0 <= i < n, does not modify the input array, allows the empty-loop case n == 0, and returns sum(l) while preserving IntArray::full(a, n, l). The contract also assumes every element is in a bounded integer range and the mathematical sum fits in signed 32-bit int.
